cells.data:
filetype off
set nocompatible

set rtp+=~/.vim/bundle/Vundle.vim
call vundle#begin()

Plugin 'VundleVim/Vundle.vim'
Plugin 'flazz/vim-colorschemes'
Plugin 'tpope/vim-fugitive'
Plugin 'kien/ctrlp.vim'
Plugin 'scrooloose/nerdtree'
Plugin 'rking/ag.vim'
Plugin 'xolox/vim-easytags'
Plugin 'xolox/vim-misc'
Plugin 'majutsushi/tagbar'
Plugin 'matze/vim-move'
Plugin 'jeetsukumaran/vim-buffergator'
Plugin 'jelera/vim-javascript-syntax'
Plugin 'gavocanov/vim-js-indent'
Plugin 'Valloric/YouCompleteMe'
Plugin 'marijnh/tern_for_vim'
Plugin 'mileszs/ack.vim'
Plugin 'Shougo/unite.vim'

call vundle#end()

let mapleader=","
set ruler
set number
set hidden

set history=1000
set visualbell
set autoread
set shiftround
set cursorline
set laststatus=2

set timeout timeoutlen=200 ttimeoutlen=100

syntax enable
colorscheme atom

set backspace=indent,eol,start
set ignorecase smartcase
set incsearch
set hlsearch
map <silent><BS> :nohlsearch<CR>
set foldmethod=indent

"Not sure I want this. Clutter
set list
set listchars=
set listchars+=tab:→\ 
set listchars+=trail:·
set listchars+=extends:»              " show cut off when nowrap
set listchars+=precedes:«
set listchars+=nbsp:⣿

set splitbelow
set splitright

set showcmd
set showmode

set autoindent
set tabstop=4
set shiftwidth=4
set softtabstop=4
set noexpandtab

set noswapfile
set nobackup
set nowb

nnoremap ; :
nnoremap <Leader>w :w!<CR>
nnoremap <Leader><Leader> V
nnoremap <Leader>e :Explore<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>a :Ag

nnoremap <Leader>bp :bprevious<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>bn :bnext<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>ls :ls<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>tb :TagbarToggle<CR>

nnoremap <Leader>s :set expandtab<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>t :set noexpandtab<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>ns :set nolist<CR>

nnoremap <C-J> <C-W><C-J>
nnoremap <C-K> <C-W><C-K>
nnoremap <C-L> <C-W><C-L>
nnoremap <C-H> <C-W><C-H>

set pastetoggle=<F2>

let g:move_key_modifier='C'

nnoremap <Leader>p :CtrlP<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>cb :CtrlPBuffer<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>cm :CtrlPMixed<CR>
let g:ctrlp_cmd = 'CtrlPMixed'
let g:ctrlp_by_filename = '1'
let g:ctrlp_match_window = 'bottom, order:ttb'
let g:ctrlp_switch_buffer = 0
let g:ctrlp_working_path_mode = 'r'

let g:ctrlp_use_caching=0
" The Silver Searcher
if executable('ag')
set grepprg=ag\ --nogroup\ --nocolor
let g:ctrlp_user_command = 'ag %s -l --nocolor -g ""'
else
let g:ctrlp_user_command = ['.git', 'cd %s && git ls-files . -co --exclude-standard', 'find %s -type f']
endif

nnoremap <Leader>f :NERDTreeToggle<CR>
nnoremap <Leader>e :NERDTreeFind<CR>
let NERDTreeShowBookmarks = 1
let NERDTreeChDirMode = 0
let NERDTreeQuitOnOpen = 0
let NERDTreeMouseMode = 2
let NERDTreeShowHidden = 1

"Find merge conflicts - github.com/spf13-vim/blob/3.0/.vimrc
map <Leader>mc /\v^[<\|=>\{7}( .*\|$)<CR>

"Visual shifting - github.com/spf13-vim/blob/3.0/.vimrc
vnoremap < <gv
vnoremap > >gv

let g:move_key_modifier = 'C'

set nowrap
set linebreak

set wildmode=list:longest
set wildmenu
set wildignore=*vim/backups*
set wildignore+=*DS_Store*
set wildignore+=node_modules/**
set wildignore+=tmp/**
set wildignore+=*.png,*.jpg,*.gif
autocmd FileType gitcommit setlocal textwidth=72

"Scroolose
let statusline+=%#warningmsg#
let statusline+=%{SyntasticStatuslineFlag()}
let statusline+=%*
let g:syntastic_always_populate_loc_list = 1
let g:syntastic_auto_loc_list = 1
let g:syntastic_check_on_open = 1
let g:syntastic_check_on_wq = 0
let g:syntastic_js_checkers = ['eslint']

"Vim Unite
let g:unite_source_menu_menus = get(g:,'unite_source_menu_menus',{})
let g:unite_source_menu_menus.git = {
    \ 'description' : '            gestionar repositorios git
        \                            ⌘ [espacio]g',
    \}
let g:unite_source_menu_menus.git.command_candidates = [
    \['▷ tig                                                        ⌘ ,gt',
        \'normal ,gt'],
    \['▷ git status       (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gs',
        \'Gstatus'],
    \['▷ git diff         (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gd',
        \'Gdiff'],
    \['▷ git commit       (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gc',
        \'Gcommit'],
    \['▷ git log          (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gl',
        \'exe "silent Glog | Unite quickfix"'],
    \['▷ git blame        (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gb',
        \'Gblame'],
    \['▷ git stage        (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gw',
        \'Gwrite'],
    \['▷ git checkout     (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,go',
        \'Gread'],
    \['▷ git rm           (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gr',
        \'Gremove'],
    \['▷ git mv           (Fugitive)                                ⌘ ,gm',
        \'exe "Gmove " input("destino: ")'],
    \['▷ git push         (Fugitive, salida por buffer)             ⌘ ,gp',
        \'Git! push'],
    \['▷ git pull         (Fugitive, salida por buffer)             ⌘ ,gP',
        \'Git! pull'],
    \['▷ git prompt       (Fugitive, salida por buffer)             ⌘ ,gi',
        \'exe "Git! " input("comando git: ")'],
    \['▷ git cd           (Fugitive)',
        \'Gcd'],
    \]
nnoremap <silent>[menu]g :Unite -silent -start-insert menu:git<CR>
